description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat, dark-tiled roof and a prominent front porch supported by white columns. The facade features a symmetrical arrangement of windows and doors, with a balcony running along the upper floor. The property includes a paved driveway, two palm trees at the front, and a side yard with a swimming pool, sun loungers, and an umbrella. Several deciduous trees are positioned around the lot, enhancing the suburban feel. A car is parked in the driveway, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and open outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, front porch, balcony, driveway, and a side yard featuring a pool and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch with columns, driveway, palm trees, and a car.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the driveway, palm trees, and the car, with the front porch and balcony visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, sun loungers, umbrella, and grouped trees.
description_view_3: Angled rear view focusing on the pool area, umbrella, and landscaping, with the side of the bungalow visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
